title: cordia iguaguana
intro: Cordia iguaguana, also known as the Bejuco tree or Iguana Cordia, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its woody stem and clusters of small, white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cordia iguaguana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Cordia iguaguana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
